pages.text: PreFabs enter $(bold)HALTED$() state when:$(br2)$(li)Input chest is empty (can't pull)$(li)Output chest is full (can't push)$(li)Importer/Exporter was broken$(br2)CM chunks stay $(bold)unloaded$() and do not reload.

pages.title: How to Recover
pages.text: $(bold)Step 1:$() Diagnose$(br)- Check input chests (empty?)$(br)- Check output chests (full?)$(br2)$(bold)Step 2:$() Fix$(br)- Restock inputs$(br)- Clear outputs$(br2)$(bold)Step 3:$() Resume$(br)Right-click with wrench → SIMULATING

pages.title: Preventing HALTED
pages.text: $(li)Use larger chests (Barrels, Storage Drawers)$(li)Balance input supply to match consumption$(li)Automate restocking (hoppers, pipes)$(li)Monitor chest levels with comparators$(br2)$(bold)Tip:$() 1 coal/tick = 1200 coal/minute needed.
